description: Production-like SigNoz stack overview for demo: SigNoz UI, OTel Collector, ClickHouse, Zookeeper, ClickHouse Operator, k8s-infra collectors, and telemetry volume.
title: SigNoz Production Stack Overview

widgets.title: SigNoz Component Inventory
widgets.description: Bang giai thich cac thanh phan cua stack SigNoz va vai tro cua tung thanh phan.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT 'signoz' AS component, 'signoz-production' AS namespace, 'UI + query service + alerting' AS role UNION ALL SELECT 'signoz-otel-collector', 'signoz-production', 'OTLP ingest: logs, metrics, traces' UNION ALL SELECT 'signoz-clickhouse', 'signoz-production', 'Telemetry storage in ClickHouse' UNION ALL SELECT 'signoz-zookeeper', 'signoz-production', 'ClickHouse coordination' UNION ALL SELECT 'signoz-clickhouse-operator', 'signoz-production', 'Manage ClickHouseInstallation' UNION ALL SELECT 'signoz-k8s-infra-otel-agent', 'signoz-production-agents', 'DaemonSet: pod logs, host/kubelet metrics' UNION ALL SELECT 'signoz-k8s-infra-otel-deployment', 'signoz-production-agents', 'Deployment: cluster metrics and Kubernetes events'

widgets.title: Telemetry Volume - Last 24h
widgets.description: Chung minh SigNoz da ingest du lieu vao ClickHouse: logs, metric samples, metric series va traces.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT 'logs' AS signal, count() AS rows FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE timestamp >= toUnixTimestamp64Nano(now64(9) - INTERVAL 24 HOUR) UNION ALL SELECT 'metric_samples', count() FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE unix_milli >= (toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR) * 1000) UNION ALL SELECT 'metric_series', count() FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 UNION ALL SELECT 'traces', count() FROM signoz_traces.signoz_index_v3 WHERE timestamp >= now64(9) - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

widgets.title: Logs By SigNoz Component - Last 30m
widgets.description: Cho thay k8s-infra dang thu logs/events va gan resource attributes nhu signoz.component, namespace, object.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT if(resources_string['signoz.component'] = '', 'unknown', resources_string['signoz.component']) AS component, count() AS log_rows FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE timestamp >= toUnixTimestamp64Nano(now64(9) - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) GROUP BY component ORDER BY log_rows DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Recent Kubernetes Events
widgets.description: Kubernetes events duoc collector ghi vao logs_v2. Panel nay dung de demo su kien pod/container tren cluster.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) AS ts, attributes_string['k8s.namespace.name'] AS namespace, resources_string['k8s.object.kind'] AS kind, resources_string['k8s.object.name'] AS object, attributes_string['k8s.event.reason'] AS reason, severity_text, body FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE scope_name LIKE '%k8seventsreceiver%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Metric Samples By Minute
widgets.description: Throughput metric samples vao ClickHouse. Neu duong nay co du lieu, k8s-infra metrics dang chay.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfMinute(toDateTime(unix_milli / 1000)) AS ts, count() AS samples FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE unix_milli >= (toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) * 1000) GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfMinute(toDateTime(timestamp / 1000000000)) AS ts, count() AS logs FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE timestamp >= toUnixTimestamp64Nano(now64(9) - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Smoke Test Traces
widgets.description: Trace smoke-test chung minh duong OTLP traces hoat dong: app -> collector -> ClickHouse -> SigNoz UI.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT timestamp, serviceName, name, round(duration_nano / 1000000, 2) AS duration_ms, status_code_string, trace_id FROM signoz_traces.signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'signoz-production-smoke' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
